description: Eval fixture built from real METRO Cash & Carry Moldova invoice #94. Products are abbreviated names in Romanian/Russian. Update expected_product_id values if products are re-imported with new UUIDs.

queries.notes: Fuzzy Romanian: peanut halva. Semantic + lexical should both hit.
Single-term exact match. Lexical should excel.
Fuzzy multi-word: halva victorita vanilla or peanut. Tests semantic ranking.
Romanian: fruit tea. Any CEAI product is acceptable — CEAI ZMEURA or CEAI LOVARE both valid. UUID omitted intentionally: either product satisfies the query.
Exact uppercase term. Both lexical and semantic should hit.
Romanian: condensed milk. Semantic should rank LAPTE CONDEN products first.

queries.query: re-comanda laptele de la saptamana trecuta
queries.notes: Fluffy WhatsApp order repetition phrase in Romanian. Tests semantic intent understanding.
Romanian: cod liver. Tests exact product type phrase.
Exact EAN-13 barcode for cod liver. Lexical should excel; semantic may miss.
Romanian: sunflower seeds. Abbreviated as SEM FL SOARE in catalog.
Romanian: gingerbread with plums. Semantic should surface TURTA DULCE LUXUS PRUNE.
Romanian: gingerbread. Exact two-word phrase match.
Romanian: semolina/wheat. ARNAUT GRAU BUNETTO is semolina. Tests category concept match.
Romanian: herbal tea for babies. AMESTEC DE PLANTE BABY FL. Tests semantic category match.
Exact EAN-13 barcode for condensed milk IRISK. Lexical should find it directly.
